build.beforeBuildCommand: python3 tools/release_supply_chain.py check && python3 tools/release_supply_chain.py check-installed && npm --workspace @wardrobe/desktop-ui run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
